modification_notice: Extracted only complete Simplified Chinese paragraph and list-item sentences from the checksum-pinned Ready.gov main element, removed navigation, images, external resources, phone/URL instructions, page furniture, and exact duplicates, and added input-only provenance; no expected text or converter output was used.
known_biases: Official U.S. emergency guidance is not representative of ordinary Taiwan traffic.
Flood, evacuation, insurance, medical, and safety language is intentionally concentrated.
List-derived fragments and inline heading joins require input-only eligibility review.
Only FEMA-authored text in the main element is extracted; images, insignia, navigation, and linked third-party content are excluded.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
